title: [Retired] Dungeons and Taverns End Castle Standalone
description: Retired, we decided to retire this project since keeping it up becomes too much of a technical challange for something that is already within main DNT. There be dragons
body:
This mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

The End castle Generates a giant End City like Structure with an Endportal Frame, Trial Spawner, 1 Guranteed bit End ship, 1 Custom Trial Spawner boss at the same coordinates as Strongholds and can be alternatively located with eyes of ender

Shulker Trial Spawner Spawn just 1 Shulker and all trial spawner take 1 hour and 30 minutes to recharge, making shulker boxes renewable without shulker farm.

Trial Spawner have a 1/5 chance to drop an End Castle Key

When Ominous, they have a 1/5 chance to drop an End Ship Key

End Castle Keys can be used within the end Castle houses, main building or in the house on the big end ship

End Ship Keys can be used on any lone End Ship, including the big one at the end castle

End Ship Vaults always contain 1 Elytra. Quality Depends on Ship Size

Adds also 2 Enchantments:
- Gravity
  - Shoot an arrow which pulls all mobs around it upon landing, destroying the arrow in the process
  - Items: Crossbow
  - Max level: 3
  - Incompatible with: Piercing, Multishot and Ghasted
  - Found in: End Castle
- Wax wings
  - Negates durability damage from slow gliding but raises by 50% the durability damage from gliding fast
  - Items: Elytra
  - Max level: 1
  - Incompatible with: Unbreaking
  - Found in: End castle
Trial Spawner Spawning minibosses such as Shulker Miniboss and Shulker Boss have a higher chance for key drops
The Phantom Boss Trial Spawner always drops an End Ship Key
Shulker Minibosses (the 2³ Sized ones) aply 5 seconds of levitation 3 on you
Shulker Bosses (the 3³ Sizedones) aply 15 seconds of levitation 2 on you
The Phantom Boss Removes any Levitation effect on you instantly, when hitting you.

If you dont Want those enchantments, use this datapack: https://modrinth.com/datapack/nofun-dnt
